form_ph_subject: Business Analyst position, digital project manager…
profile_card2_text: Backlog, planning, reporting, committee facilitation — I keep projects on track in multi-project environments.
proj_r_desc: Authoring of the infrastructure standards reference guide for all public-facing platforms of the French Ministry of Culture — Keycloak SSO, CaptchEtat, Varnish and Redis caches. Document ensuring reproducibility, compliance and identity management across all deployment environments.
proj_sec_desc: Analysis and supervision of post-security-audit remediation (EY audit, commissioned by the French Ministry of Culture) across CultureGouv and the Event sites. 2 critical vulnerabilities resolved in 48h, 2 high-severity and 7 others fixed within 1 month. Technical team coordination and compliance verification across each platform.

profile_card1_text: Requirements gathering, user stories, business rules, specifications — I structure what is unclear.
proj_g_kpil: migration from Sinequa · API and search engine rebuild
proj_o_desc: Modernisation of the OFPRA web platform in response to GDPR requirements. Technical improvements (Redis, Varnish) for performance and security, integration of compliant tools: consent management (Tarte au citron) and ethical analytics (Matomo).
proj_mn_kpil: automated business workflows · double entry eliminated · 6 collection types · delivered in 4 months
proj_m_desc: Management of the analytics migration from Piano Analytics to Eulerian across all public-facing websites of the French Ministry of Culture. Technical team coordination, integration testing on each platform and authoring of the reference REX document to standardise future deployments.
proj_cc_kpil: platforms · Android & iOS · bug qualification · contractor coordination · acceptance testing
profile_exp: My background combines 3 years' experience of web, digital and IS projects, with a technical culture derived from web development and webmastering, as well as an awareness of mobile uses, automation and AI.
profile_note: Project English: exchanges with English-speaking teams.
proj_a_kpil: developers managed · delivered on time and budget

meta_desc: Digital Project Manager · AMOA Consultant · Business Analyst. 3 years of public-sector missions: functional scoping, web project management, IT coordination and change management.
proj_g_desc: Scoping of the business API rebuild and search engine migration from Sinequa to OpenSearch. Target architecture definition, stakeholder coordination and delivery of scoping artefacts for the transition to a high-performance open-source solution.
hero_target_label: Available to join a team on roles close to
proj_mn_desc: Led the overhaul and full automation of a business API for the Mobilier national web portal. Before the redesign, each object record (furniture, textiles, photographs…) had to be entered twice: in the MuseumPlus ERP, then manually in the web app. The new system connects directly to MuseumPlus via Laravel / RabbitMQ and synchronises all CRUD actions on collections in real time. Deliverables: functional scoping, API spec review, data mapping and test plan template. Team: 1 dev, 1 client MOA, 1 external contractor, 1 hosting provider.
proj_cc_desc: Punctual AMOA support for the corrective maintenance (MCO) of the #CultureChezNous mobile app (French Ministry of Culture) on Android and iOS. Bug qualification, coordination with the mobile development contractor and functional acceptance testing of delivered fixes.
proj_sem_kpil: developers coordinated · Algolia indexing deployed · 0 regressions after test framework rollout
proj_ird_kpil: 10+ evolutions managed · 3 simultaneous scopes · onshore/offshore team · institutional site · webzine · intranet
cookie_functional_text: Necessary for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.
proj_c_desc: Triple overhaul: visual (DSFR v2), CMS (ez Publish → Ibexa 4.6) and infrastructure (on-premise → OVH Cloud · Kubernetes · Jenkins). Led data migration, mapped impacted components, wrote front & back-office functional test plans, coordinated analytics tagging. Co-managed a 6-person technical team.
proj_atl_kpil: languages — multilingual forms FR · EN · AR · ES · IT · 10+ features · 3 sprints
proj_a_desc: Full rebuild of the ANOM public information system to Drupal 10 with adoption of the French State Design System (DSFR). Management of a 3-developer team, test plan authoring and back-office admin guide.
proj_vr_desc: Automated regulatory monitoring platform watching 5 official sources (CNIL, CERT-FR, ANSSI, EUR-Lex, CERT Santé) across 6 frameworks (GDPR, NIS2, DORA, ISO 27001, HDS, PCI-DSS). Pipeline: Make → Gemini 2.0 Flash → pure HTML/JS dashboard.
xp4_desc: Sales, client contact and needs assessment.
proj_note: A selection of the most representative missions — non-exhaustive list, further references available on request.
xp3_desc: Content production, image and associative coordination.

profile_p1: Experienced in large-scale projects (web portal overhauls, IS modernisation, multi-perimeter MCO), I'm in charge of the project cycle from spec to acceptance, in coordination with the business and technical teams.
proj_r_kpil: ministerial platforms covered by the reference guide
proj_sem_desc: Operational management of the Sémaphore intranet platform at the French Ministry of Culture for nearly a year. Weekly follow-up committee facilitation, daily coordination of the development team, test plan creation, functional testing and user story writing with acceptance criteria. Delivery of a Bash automation script. Continuous management and prioritisation of the incident and evolution backlog.
proj_ird_desc: Simultaneous management of a batch of complex functional evolutions across three distinct scopes at the Institut de recherche pour le développement: institutional site, webzine and intranet. Backlog management, user story prioritisation and interface role between business teams and the onshore/offshore delivery team.
xp1_desc: Front desk, organisation and customer service.
exp_card3_li2: Collaboration with dev and UX/UI teams

profile_p2: My dual dev / BA background lets me understand technical constraints and coordinate more effectively with delivery teams. On Sémaphore, I initiated non-regression testing that put an end to repeated re-deliveries — the kind of initiative I am looking to build on in a stable permanent role.

proj_atl_desc: Technical and visual redesign of the contact journey for the Ibexa multi-site «Atlantic-comfort» — deployed across the group’s international websites. Writing technico-functional specifications for 3 dynamic forms (nested conditional logic, reCAPTCHA v2, phone validation, automated department-specific email notifications configurable in the back office). Managing a 3-person team (1 UX, 2 devs) in coordination with the client’s business, sales and project owner stakeholders. 2-month mission, delivered in 3 due to testing obstacles.
